tasks.description: Create docs/agent/tools.md stub: headings for each planned tool (run_shell, web_search, fetch_url, git_status, git_diff, git_log, git_branch, delete_file, move_file, create_directory) with one-line descriptions

Create docs/agent/security.md stub: headings for path sandboxing, tool allowlisting, Ollama API auth, rate limiting, output size limits, audit log, and confirmation prompts — each with a one-line summary
Add tool_git_status() to agent.py: runs git status --short, returns output. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS list.
Add tool_git_diff(path) to agent.py: runs git diff, returns output. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS list.
Add tool_git_log(n=10) to agent.py: runs git log --oneline -n, returns output. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS list.
Add /load glob support to handle_slash: if arg contains *, use glob.glob() to expand, then load each matched file into context.
Add /model <name> slash command to handle_slash: updates _session_model and prints new tier info.

Create tests/__init__.py and tests/test_tools.py with stub test functions (pass body) for: test_read_file_safe, test_path_blocked, test_write_file, test_patch_file, test_search_files, test_task_lifecycle.
Create docs/architecture/index.md stub: heading, one-paragraph intro, and list of links to sub-documents.
Create docs/architecture/network-topology.md stub: headings for Network Roles, Coordinator Architecture, Communication Protocol, Design Decisions. Each section has a TODO placeholder.
Create docs/architecture/task-schema.md stub: headings for Task Object Fields, Task State Machine, Task Decomposition Rules, Task Types. Each section has a TODO placeholder.
Create docs/architecture/node-protocol.md stub: headings for Node Identity, Capability Advertisement, Registration, Heartbeat, Task Handshake, Result Submission. Each section has a TODO placeholder.
Create docs/architecture/api-spec.md stub: one heading per coordinator endpoint with method, path, and one-line description for each.
Create docs/architecture/verification.md stub: headings for Verification Tiers, Automated Verification, Consensus Verification, Human Review Queue, Dispute Resolution. TODO placeholders.
Create docs/architecture/reputation.md stub: headings for Score Formula, Reputation Tiers, Staking, Public Ledger. Include formula variable names as a code block with TODO labels.
Create docs/architecture/credits.md stub: headings for Credit Unit, Ledger Schema, Submitter Credits, Contributor Earnings, Verifier Earnings, Platform Fee, Escrow, Transfer. TODO placeholders.
Create docs/setup/getting-started-contributor.md stub: headings for Prerequisites, Installation, First Run, Running Your First Task, Earnings. Each section has 2-3 placeholder bullet points.
Create docs/setup/getting-started-submitter.md stub: headings for Prerequisites, Getting Credits, Submitting a Task, Reviewing Results, Paying Out. Each section has 2-3 placeholder bullet points.

Create docs/task-types.md stub: one section per task type (text/write, text/summarize, text/translate, code/generate, code/review, code/refactor, research/summarize, data/analyze, data/extract). Each section lists Input, Output, Verification, and Examples as subheadings with TODO placeholders.
Create CONTRIBUTING.md stub: headings for How to Contribute, Development Setup, Code Style, Running Tests, Submitting a PR, Reporting Issues. 2-3 placeholder bullet points each.
Append Model Tier System section to docs/agent/overview.md: explain the 4 tiers, what difficulty each handles, and how get_next_task filters. Append only — do not modify existing content.
Append Session Persistence section to docs/agent/overview.md: describe save_session, load_session, auto-save on exit, /save command, and resume on continue. Append only.
Create docs/agent/slash-commands.md: reference page for every slash command with usage, description, and example output.
Write docs/faq.md: answer common questions about privacy, earnings potential, hardware requirements, task quality, credits, and node security.
Implement output size limit in tool_write_file: add MAX_WRITE_BYTES = 1_048_576, return an error if content exceeds it.
Implement audit log: append a JSON line to .openwork/audit.log for every tool call. Each entry: timestamp, tool name, argument key names only, result char count.
Implement --allow flag in main(): accept comma-separated tool names. Check ALLOWED_TOOLS set in execute_tool() before dispatching. Return permission error if not allowed.
Implement tool_create_directory(path): create a directory sandboxed to REPO_ROOT using os.makedirs(exist_ok=True). Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement tool_move_file(src, dst): move a file within REPO_ROOT using shutil.move. Both paths must pass _safe_path(). Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement tool_delete_file(path): delete a file (sandboxed). Print file path and size, prompt [y/N] confirmation before deleting. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement tool_fetch_url(url, timeout=10): fetch a URL using urllib.request, strip HTML tags, return first 8000 chars of readable text. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement tool_web_search(query, num_results=5): call DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API, return title + snippet for each result. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement tool_git_branch(name): runs git checkout -b name with [y/N] confirmation. Register in TOOL_DISPATCH and TOOLS.
Implement named sessions: add --session <name> CLI flag. SESSION_FILE becomes .openwork/sessions/<name>.json. Create sessions/ subdirectory on first use.
Implement large file chunking in tool_read_file: if file > 32000 chars, return first 30000 chars plus a message showing total chunk count.
Add progress indicator: show elapsed seconds on stderr while waiting for Ollama response using a background thread. Clear on response.
Add token usage display: parse eval_count and prompt_eval_count from Ollama response. After each turn print token counts.
Implement complete test suite in tests/test_tools.py: round-trip read/write, patch, search, path traversal block, task lifecycle, model tier filtering in get_next_task.
Write integration test in tests/test_integration.py: send a prompt to run_turn() with mocked ollama_call, verify tool call execution and non-empty response.
Write security tests in tests/test_security.py: verify _safe_path blocks path traversal, absolute paths outside root, and symlinks pointing outside root.
Write loop detection test: mock ollama_call to always return a tool_call. Verify run_turn() halts after MAX_TOOL_CALLS with the expected warning message.
Write full content for docs/architecture/network-topology.md: define all 4 roles, explain 3-stage coordinator progression with tradeoffs, justify REST+WebSocket choice, include ASCII flow diagram.
Write full content for docs/architecture/task-schema.md: all Task fields with types and examples, state machine ASCII diagram, decomposition rules, and all 9 task type definitions.
Write full content for docs/architecture/node-protocol.md: Ed25519 key spec, capability advertisement fields, registration flow, heartbeat timing, task handshake sequence, result submission schema.
Write OpenAPI YAML spec (docs/api/openapi.yaml): request body, response schema, error responses, and auth for every coordinator endpoint.
Write full content for docs/task-types.md: input format, output format, verification method, context size, bounty range, and 3 examples for each of the 9 task types.
Write task template library schema (docs/templates/schema.md): template JSON format and 3 example templates: blog-post-writer, code-reviewer, document-summarizer.
Write launch blog post (docs/blog/launch.md): what the project is, how it differs from competitors, how to join, what to expect in beta, how to give feedback. 800-1200 words.
Write full docs/architecture/verification.md: verification tiers with bounty thresholds, LLM-as-judge prompt structure, consensus algorithm, dispute flow with timelines.
Write full docs/architecture/reputation.md: all formula weights with values and justification, tier thresholds, staking and burn rules, public ledger schema.
Write full docs/architecture/credits.md: credit unit peg, ledger entry schema, quality_multiplier formula, escrow flow, platform fee justification, transfer rules.
Write docs/architecture/coordinator.md: FastAPI vs Go comparison with evaluation criteria and final recommendation.
Implement coordinator service skeleton: coordinator/ directory with FastAPI main.py, Pydantic models, in-memory queue, node registry, and stub endpoints for all routes.
Implement task state machine in coordinator/state.py: TaskState enum, validated transitions, SQLite persistence, and tests for all transitions.
Implement task matching algorithm in coordinator/matching.py: score nodes by capability/reputation/load/speed, return ranked list. Write unit tests with mock data.
Implement LLM-as-judge in coordinator/verification.py: evaluation prompt, parse judge JSON into scores, compute weighted overall score 0.0-1.0.
Implement multi-node consensus in coordinator/consensus.py: pairwise semantic similarity via sentence-transformers, majority cluster detection, reputation-weighted voting.
Implement reputation engine in coordinator/reputation.py: score updates for all event types, inactivity decay, append-only ledger. Write unit tests.
Implement credit ledger in coordinator/ledger.py: append-only SQLite table, escrow lock/release, platform fee. Write full bounty lifecycle tests.
Implement contributor node daemon in node/daemon.py: polling loop, Ollama execution, result submission, graceful shutdown, crash recovery.
Build terminal dashboard in node/dashboard.py using rich: live display of current task, earnings, reputation, uptime. Refresh every 5 seconds.
Implement openwork submit CLI (cli/submit.py): flags for all task fields, file attachment, coordinator POST, prints task_id on success.
Implement Python SDK (sdk/openwork_sdk.py): submit(), status(), get(), balance(). Package as pip installable with pyproject.toml.
Set up GitHub Actions CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml): pytest, ruff linting, black formatting on every push to main.
Write docs/architecture/anti-fraud.md: Sybil resistance options, collusion detection methods, wash trading prevention. Recommend MVP approaches.
Write docs/architecture/decomposition.md: task split triggers, DAG dependency model, result reassembly strategies, coordinator state tracking for multi-step tasks.
Set up MkDocs or Docusaurus docs site with GitHub Pages deployment. Link all docs/ files.
Implement node Ed25519 keypair generation: generate on first run, store private key at ~/.openwork/node_key.pem (chmod 600), derive node_id as hex of public key hash.
Implement request signing: X-Node-Id and X-Signature headers on all node requests. Coordinator verifies Ed25519 signature on every request.
Implement Ollama API local auth: shared-secret token at startup, stored in .openwork/ollama_token, required on all local Ollama API calls.
Implement task poisoning prevention: validate all task input fields, detect and reject prompt injection patterns, oversized context, malformed output_spec.
Implement Sybil resistance: proof-of-compute challenge on registration, rate-limit 3 registrations per IP per hour, minimum reputation stake for high-bounty tasks.
Deploy coordinator MVP to VPS: HTTPS with Let's Encrypt, systemd service, automated SQLite backups, uptime monitoring.
Integrate Stripe for credit purchases: POST /credits/purchase endpoint, payment webhook, credit submitter on success. API keys in environment variables only.
Build human review interface: web app where reviewer sees task, output, and judge scores side by side, approves or rejects with feedback. Auth via API key.
Conduct penetration test of coordinator API: test SQLi, auth bypass, IDOR, rate limit bypass, task poisoning. Write findings at docs/security/pentest-report.md.
Run closed beta: recruit 10-20 contributors, monitor for 4-6 weeks, fix top bugs, write findings report.
Implement one-command contributor installer (scripts/install.sh): detect OS and RAM, install Ollama, download model, generate keypair, create node.yaml, register with coordinator.
